message.ae2lt.config_migrated_v2: [AE2 Lightning Tech] Your ae2lt-common.toml has been reset to defaults to apply rebalanced values from this update. If you had customized any settings, please re-apply them in the new file.
message.ae2lt.config_migrated_v2.matrix: [AE2 Lightning Tech] The Overload Processing Factory's matrix slot is now capped at 32. Existing stacks above 32 are preserved but only 32 matrices contribute to parallelism — please open the GUI and take out the excess matrices.

§eExecution Slot§r§7
§cEHv3 (max-charged) shots only§r§7
Locks the target's HP on hit; next shot resolves as min(recorded, current) - damage
Final ≤ 0 → §c5-layer forced kill§r§7
Recovers over 60s on a §6quadratic§r§7 curve (slow start, fast finish)

tooltip.ae2lt.mysterious_cell.high_volta: SR - High-voltage flux residue, compressed in the core.
tooltip.ae2lt.mysterious_cell.extreme_hi: SSR - Extreme-voltage residue; readout may tear through cloud cover.
tooltip.ae2lt.mysterious_cell.lightning_: UR - The residual pattern collapses into a full matrix core on readout.
tooltip.ae2lt.mysterious_cell.research_n: UR - An unwritten research note; its cursor still hangs on an unresolved state.

tooltip.ae2lt.mysterious_cell.consumed: The residue has been read out; no signal detectable in the shell.
tooltip.ae2lt.mysterious_cell.consumed.h: - write-once storage: cannot be decoded a second time.

ae2lt.research_note.book.title: Research Note #%s
ae2lt.research_note.book.author: Anonymous Researcher
ae2lt.research_note.page.author: — Anonymous Researcher
ae2lt.research_note.page.intro:
Procedure.

1 The reaction zone sits directly **above** the Atmospheric Ionizer — a 3×3 horizontal footprint, 4 blocks tall.

2 Drop this notebook into the zone first so it rests on the ionizer as a free item.

3 Following the next page's list from 1 to 9, drop the nine reagents in that exact order. Each must settle as its own item entity.

4 Load a **Thunderstorm Condensate** into the ionizer and commit the nucleation; at the instant it triggers, an extreme-voltage bolt strikes the zone above, the reaction closes and yields %s.
ae2lt.research_note.page.warning:
Outcomes.

· If the types or counts do not match the list, the reaction does not trigger and the reagents stay where they are.

· If types and counts are correct but the drop order is wrong, the strike annihilates the full set at the zone; charred fragments may remain on the ground.

· This notebook is preserved in every case and can be reused for the next run.
ae2lt.research_note.desc.avaritia.infini: An ingot hammered from a metal that refuses all endings
A narrow shard of eternity pressed into workable form
ae2lt.research_note.desc.mekanism_extras: An endless archive collapsed into a palm-sized singularity
A storage horizon folded down to a single black point
ae2lt.research_note.desc.modern_industri: A machine part engraved with laws that outgrew classical limits
A quantum refinement plate buzzing with impatient industry
ae2lt.research_note.desc.bigreactors.ina: A dark reactor brick still warm with captive stars
A dense block whose inner heat never truly settles
ae2lt.research_note.desc.draconicevoluti: A violent core torn from the heart of draconic ruin
A storm-colored nucleus that still resists all order
ae2lt.research_note.desc.occultism.ritua: A ritual chalice brimming with borrowed starlight
A silver cup that gathers light no mortal sky should spill
ae2lt.research_note.desc.appflux.core_25: A storage heart swollen with two hundred and fifty-six million echoes
A vast memory core compressed behind a polished shell
ae2lt.research_note.desc.advanced_ae.dat: A knot of data lines refusing to stay in one reality
A machine shard where information twists itself into braids
ae2lt.research_note.desc.advanced_ae.qua: A lattice that lets too many futures compute at once
A threading device stitched from overlapping probabilities
ae2lt.research_note.desc.megacells.cell_: A ME cell component heavy with impossible storage debt
A polished memory shard made for absurdly deep archives
ae2lt.research_note.desc.ae2omnicells.qu: An omni-component tuned to contain every category at once
A cross-domain memory crystal singing in unified bandwidth
ae2lt.research_note.desc.mekanism_extras: A battery vessel whose appetite outlasts counting itself
A power reservoir that never learned where fullness ends
A flux core that pours forever without thinning
An induction engine built to empty eternity into wire
ae2lt.research_note.desc.mekanism.pellet: A grain of reversed light held together by pure caution
A tiny black sun that disagrees with the world around it
ae2lt.research_note.desc.mekanism_extras: A circuit whose layered logic never bottoms out
An endless command lattice etched into brilliant metal
ae2lt.research_note.desc.ars_nouveau.wil: A living tithe cut from the fiercest wild growth
A ritual remnant still carrying the breath of old woods
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.elytr: A pair of silver wings recovered from the deep End
A weathered flight membrane that still remembers the void
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.heavy: A gray core dragged up from the crush of ominous stone
A trial relic dense enough to make the air feel heavier
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.drago: A severed draconic mask staring past every age
A hollow dragon skull still crowned by End wind
ae2lt.research_note.desc.ae2.256k_crafti: A crafting mind expanded until recipes become weather
A 256K synthesis core struck through by precise thought
ae2lt.research_note.desc.mekanism.ultima: A supreme energy cell packed with disciplined thunder
A final-tier battery chamber lined with patient current
A perfected induction outlet waiting to flood the grid
A power distributor tuned for relentless release
A cluster of tiny warheads whispering in compressed fury
A pocket storm of miniature missiles primed for release
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.drago: A black-violet egg left behind by the last dragon
A sealed shell that keeps the End's silence inside
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.heart: A blue heart dredged from a chest beneath old waves
A sea-worn core still pulsing with drowned tides
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.echo_: A shard of ancient resonance chipped from the deep dark
A blue splinter that answers footsteps with memory
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.nethe: A pale ember condensed from the Wither's final collapse
A star-like fragment born from three heads of ruin
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.torch: A warm bloom recovered from a creature older than farms
A bright flower whose color feels almost prehistoric
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.recov: A compass that insists on grief becoming direction
A needle taught to point toward loss instead of north
ae2lt.research_note.desc.minecraft.slime: A trembling green orb fresh from elastic hunger
A soft glob that still remembers how to split
advancements.ae2lt.root.title: Listening In
advancements.ae2lt.root.description: Overload crystals arc softly in damp air. That spark is where every report begins.
advancements.ae2lt.lightning_simulation_: Walls thick enough to hold a small storm — no need to wait on the weather.
advancements.ae2lt.tesla_coil.title: Controlled Discharge
advancements.ae2lt.tesla_coil.descriptio: The grid takes its first artificial high-voltage strike. The clouds are off the schedule.
advancements.ae2lt.lightning_assembly_ch: Lightning for a forge. Alloys that refused to settle now do.
advancements.ae2lt.overload_processing_f: Matrix slots in parallel. Overload outputs are scheduled by the hour now.
advancements.ae2lt.crystal_catalyzer.des: Crystals processed in parallel by stack size — output scales linearly with what you load in.
advancements.ae2lt.electro_chime_crystal: After a strike, a few shards keep ringing — quietly, electrically.
advancements.ae2lt.perfect_electro_chime: Enough natural strikes, and the chime stops fluctuating. It just holds.
One thousand twenty-four AE2 singularities and a nether star, pressed into the same place.
advancements.ae2lt.ultimate_overload_cor: When the echo shard drops in, the core overloads as far as engineering allows.
advancements.ae2lt.lightning_collapse_ma: Sixteen ultimate cores, one settled chime, one hundred twenty-eight extreme-voltage strikes pressed onto a single face. What remains is the matrix.
